name: Bug Report / تقرير خطأ
about: Report a bug to help us improve / أبلغ عن خطأ للمساعدة في التحسين
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description / الوصف
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
وصف واضح ومختصر للخطأ.

## To Reproduce / خطوات إعادة الإنتاج
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior / السلوك المتوقع
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / السلوك الفعلي
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots / لقطات شاشة
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment / البيئة

### Backend (if applicable)
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- PostgreSQL version: [e.g. 16]
- Redis version: [e.g. 7]
- Deployment: [Docker / Manual / Other]

### Mobile App (if applicable)
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15, Samsung S24]
- OS version: [e.g. iOS 18, Android 14]
- App version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

### Admin Dashboard (if applicable)
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15]

## Additional Context / معلومات إضافية
Add any other context about the problem here.
